events.title: Dance of the Dragonfly — Expanded Format Launch
events.description: The long-running Wednesday somatic dance series at Dragonfly Village relaunches in an expanded format on 23 July. The evening opens with a 90-minute Sunset Somatic Embodied Ecstatic Dance in the open-air rice-field shala, led by Emmalee Bevan and Ritual Beats — a grounded progression from somatic warm-up through full ecstatic movement. Guests staying after the dance can extend into a herbal steam sauna, salt water pool, and a bonfire fire circle that runs until 9 PM. The sauna and pool add-on is IDR 80,000; fire circle access is included in the dance ticket. This July 23 edition marks the launch of the expanded format — a significant step up from the existing standalone dance session.
events.short_description: Dragonfly Village's Wednesday somatic ecstatic dance relaunches in expanded format — sunset session followed by optional herbal sauna, salt pool, and fire circle.
events.price_info: IDR 150,000 (KITAS holders) / IDR 200,000 (visitors); optional sauna & fire circle extension +IDR 80,000

events.title: Becoming: Prakriti–Pustaka–Padma
events.description: ARMA Museum marks its 30th anniversary with an international craft exhibition uniting 50 artists from eight countries — USA, Netherlands, Germany, Switzerland, India, Kenya, Iran, and Indonesia — across 79 works. 'Becoming' examines the transformative act of making: ceramics, terracotta, sculptural vessels, metalwork, keris, textiles, and batik gathered around the shared language of skilled hands. Curated by Jean Couteau, Wayan Seriyoga Parta, and Warih Wisatsana, and inaugurated in partnership with ISI Bali. Access is included with ARMA Museum general admission. Exhibition runs through 18 July.
events.short_description: 50 international artists, 79 works in ceramics, keris, and batik at ARMA's 30th anniversary international craft exhibition. Admission included with museum entry.
events.price_info: Included with ARMA Museum general admission (~IDR 100,000)
